km.Itália: ប្រទេសអ៊ីតាលី

zh.lifeSummary: Guglielmo Bianco於大約1085年出生。他至少有1個女兒。他去世在義大利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guglielmo Bianco于大约1085年出生。他至少有1个女儿。他去世在意大利。

nameMeanings.name: Bianco
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Vito, Angelo, Salvatore, Carmine, Antonio, Rocco, Aniello, Francesco, Luca, Luigi, Pasquale, Sal.

Italian: from bianco ‘white’ (of ancient Germanic origin; compare Old High German blanc ‘bright, shining, white, beautiful’), originally applied as a nickname for a man with white or fair hair or a pale complexion, or for someone who habitually wore white, especially in jousting or other competitions, and later used as a personal name. Compare Lo Bianco .

variants.name: Bianchi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Aldo, Carlo, Guido, Antonio, Dante, Giuseppe, Marino, Marco, Romeo, Salvatore.
Italian: from bianchi, plural or genitive singular of the nickname Bianco ‘white’.

variants.name: Biancaniello
meanings: Italian (Campania, mainly in province of Avellino): from the personal name   Bianco   with a derivative form or compound with the personal name   Aniello  .

variants.name: Bianconi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carlo, Fabrizio, Natale, Reno, Vitaliano.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of an augmentative of   Bianco  .

variants.name: Bianculli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Silvio.
Italian (southern): patronymic or plural form of a diminutive of   Bianco  .

variants.name: Del Bianco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenico, Emilio, Gino, Olympia, Aurelio, Aldo, Caesar, Cosmo, Dario, Domenic, Fortunato, Franco, Fulvio, Giovanni, Guido, Mario, Sirio.
Italian: literally ‘of or belonging to the white one’ (see   Bianco  ), hence a name denoting the son, apprentice, associate,or servant of a man bearing this nickname.

variants.name: Blanco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Carlos, Jorge, Luis, Raul, Francisco, Miguel, Julio, Pedro, Jesus.
Spanish: nickname for a man with white or fair hair or a pale complexion, from blanco ‘white’.
Italian (Sicily): variant of Bianco , perhaps influenced by French blanc or Spanish blanco (see 1 above).

variants.name: Lo Bianco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Sal, Salvatore, Antonio, Carmine, Gino, Marco, Riccardo, Salvator, Vincenzo.
Italian (southern; also Lobianco): variant of Bianco , with the addition of the definite article lo.

variants.name: Bianchini
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Guido, Aldo, Angelo, Mauro, Vito, Alessandro, Antonella, Antonio, Attilio, Dino, Donato, Emanuele.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of Bianchino, a diminutive of Bianco .

nameMeanings.name: Guglielmo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Germanic. See William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Guglielmo Bianco was born about 1085. He had at least 1 daughter. He died in Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Guglielmo Bianco est né environ 1085. Il a eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé à Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Guglielmo Bianco wurde um 1085 geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb in Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Guglielmo Bianco è nato il circa 1085. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guglielmo Biancoは約1085年に生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼はイタリアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guglielmo Bianco(은)는 대략 1085년 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 이탈리아에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guglielmo Bianco nasceu aproximadamente 1085. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Guglielmo Bianco родился около 1085 г. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в местности Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Guglielmo Bianco nació aproximadamente 1085. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en Italia.
